title: The Campus Flirt
writer: Louise Long, Lloyd Corrigan, Rube Goldberg
actors: Bebe Daniels, James Hall, El Brendel
plot: A product of wealth and high society, Patricia Mansfield is sent to Colton College by her father, who hopes to eradicate her snobbish veneer. On the train, Pat meets Denis Adams, a prominent athlete who is working his way through ...
